retry_reason: The operation can fail only due to memory allocation failure (ENOMEM), which is a transient condition; retrying may succeed if memory becomes available.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and attach an MPTCP extension to an skb, not to manage a reference count. The refcount initialization is an incidental side effect of allocation, and the extension object is not returned to the caller—it is stored in the skb. This is an 'add extension' helper, not a reference-count wrapper.
judge.retry_reason: The operation can fail only due to memory allocation failure (ENOMEM), which is a transient condition; retrying may succeed if memory becomes available.
